landing.title: Fixavon | Fast, Trusted Plumbers in Tbilisi
landing.description: Fixavon connects Tbilisi households with verified plumbers for repairs, installations, and emergencies. Book trusted local professionals online with transparent pricing and fast response across the capital.

hero.headline: Fast, Trusted Plumbers in Tbilisi
hero.lead: Book verified plumbers for urgent repairs, installations, and home plumbing services — all in one place. Professional care for your home is just a few clicks away.
hero.mapAlt: Map of Tbilisi showing plumbing service areas
hero.appShotAlt: App interface listing verified plumbers with ratings

footer.tagline: The modern solution for plumbing services in Tbilisi. Professional, fast, and fully verified.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting a professional plumber in Tbilisi has never been easier. Four simple steps to peace of mind.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us what's wrong—from a leaky faucet to full installation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We connect you with the best available local professionals.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pick a time that fits your schedule and confirm the price.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Relax while our professional takes care of everything.

why.title: Why Choose Fixavon
why.subtitle: We're redefining plumbing services in Tbilisi with a focus on trust and transparency.
why.c1Text: Every professional undergoes a strict background check and skill verification process.
why.c2Text: Emergency plumbing needs can't wait. We average a 30-minute response time in central Tbilisi.
why.c3Text: No hidden fees or "estimates" that double at the end. See fixed prices before you book.
why.c4Text: Our platform is designed for speed. Book your expert in under 60 seconds.
why.c5Text: Quality is our priority. We guarantee all work performed through our platform.
why.c6Text: Available in all major districts of Tbilisi, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Comprehensive plumbing solutions for every household need.

plumberSection.title: Grow Your Plumbing Business with Fixavon
plumberSection.li1Text: Stop looking for clients; let them find you through our app.
plumberSection.li2Text: Handle bookings, payments, and schedules in one simple tool.
plumberSection.li3Text: Showcase your skills with verified reviews from local customers.
plumberSection.statNote: Average income growth for our Tbilisi partners in the first 3 months.
plumberSection.imageAlt: Professional plumber in branded uniform with tools

testimonials.title: Trusted by the Community
testimonials.q1: "Excellent service! The plumber arrived in Vake within 20 minutes for an emergency leak. Professional and very clean work."
testimonials.q2: "Fixavon helped me scale my business. I no longer spend money on ads—the requests just come in through the platform."
testimonials.q3: "Very transparent. I knew exactly how much the boiler installation would cost before the guy even showed up. Highly recommend."

coverage.title: Tbilisi Coverage
coverage.lead: We serve the entire capital. Wherever you are, a Fixavon professional is nearby.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: {count, plural, one {We answer # key question below.} other {We answer # key questions below.}}
faq.q1: How quickly can a plumber arrive?
faq.a1: In central districts like Vake and Saburtalo, our average arrival time is 30 minutes for emergency calls. In other districts, it typically takes 45-60 minutes.
faq.a2: Yes, for standard services like faucet replacement or minor leaks, we have flat rates. For complex projects, you'll receive a detailed quote before the work begins.
faq.q3: What kind of guarantee do you provide?
faq.a3: All work completed through Fixavon is covered by our 6-month satisfaction guarantee. If anything goes wrong with the repair, we'll fix it for free.

finalCta.needHelpText: Get matched with a verified professional in seconds and fix your plumbing issues today.
finalCta.plumberText: Join Tbilisi's most professional network and grow your local business faster than ever.
